component.name: kappastream
component.summary: Lightweight, account-free Twitch viewer for Linux

description.p: kappastream is a lightweight Twitch viewer for Linux: live stream, IRC chat, favorites with live status, mentions, and per-channel desktop notifications.

It is account-free and read-only — no Twitch login, no OAuth, no client ID. Chat is read from the public IRC WebSocket; live status and metadata come from DecAPI. Streams are resolved locally via streamlink and played back with hls.js in a Tauri WebView.

Favorites poll DecAPI for uptime/viewers/game with retry backoff and a circuit breaker on rate limits. Everything — favorites, settings, cached state — stays in local storage. No telemetry, no accounts, no server.

Chat timestamps now render before the badges instead of after them. The IRCv3 tag-value escape decoder no longer mis-decodes backslash followed by s. The AppStream release history now covers every released version (0.1.0 through 0.1.9), unblocking Flathub submission.

AppImage built on Ubuntu 24.04 with the newer WebKitGTK 2.44 and GStreamer stack for smoother NVIDIA/Wayland playback; native packages stay on Ubuntu 22.04 for the wider glibc window. NVIDIA X11 no longer renders a blank window (WEBKIT_DISABLE_DMABUF_RENDERER is now applied selectively inside the binary).

NVIDIA Wayland users no longer need WebKitGTK compositing disabled globally: the binary now sets __NV_DISABLE_EXPLICIT_SYNC=1 selectively at startup. Added a version-drift guard (scripts/check-versions.sh) run in CI and the release checklist.
The hls.js low-latency mode now follows the Low Latency setting instead of being hardcoded on, fixing constant micro-underruns and audio/video desync on webkit2gtk when Low Latency is off.

Favorites no longer get stuck loading for ~10 minutes after startup, and live/offline status publishes before avatars and metadata. Added a Vitest frontend test suite and CI gates for npm test and cargo fmt.

Added mpv handoff via streamlink --player=mpv, a low-latency playback mode, a system tray icon with close-to-tray, typed @tauri-apps/api IPC (window.__TAURI__ disabled), and tooltip and stall-recovery fixes for webkit2gtk.
Dependency bumps and CI workflow updates, including ignoring TypeScript major updates in Dependabot (7.x breaks the svelte-check gate).
Restored the kappastream-<ver>-x86_64.tar.gz consumed by the kappastream-bin AUR package, declared streamlink as a .deb/.rpm dependency, and showed the real release version in the About modal.
GitHub Actions CI (type-check, clippy, cargo test) and the release workflow building AppImage/.deb/.rpm bundles with a SHA256SUMS checksum file. Added issue templates and Dependabot.

ul.li: Live stream playback via streamlink + hls.js
Read-only IRC chat over the public Twitch WebSocket
Favorites with DecAPI live status, retry backoff, circuit breaker
Per-channel desktop notifications (with startup grace period)
29 themes, UI scale, theater mode, JSON favorites import/export
